name: program
description: - This is frAgile Software's web app, created for our 3rd year Software Design project at WITS university :D.

scripts.test: concurrently "npm test --prefix server" "CI=true npm test --prefix client"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
scripts.setup: npm ci && npm run setup:client && npm run setup:server
